name: doperpowers
description: doperpowers — a two-track software-development methodology for coding agents, packaged as a Claude Code plugin.

plugins.name: doperpowers
plugins.description: A two-track methodology for coding agents: a human-gated controlled track (brainstorm → spec → plan → subagent-driven TDD → review → ship) plus an autonomous board loop that drives well-scoped work to reviewed PRs unattended.
